case_for: Cousins is projected for 34.4 points and has cleared 12.0 in four of his last six games, including a 34.4-point outburst just last week, showing he has the ceiling and recent form to clear a modest bar.
case_against: His floor has shown real volatility with two sub-8-point duds (6.2 and 7.5) this season, so an off game or poor matchup could again leave him short of even this low threshold.
